ast.name: CollateralVault

functions.name: __covenant_policy_deposit

exprs.span: { owner: prev_states[0].owner, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral + amount, debt: prev_states[0].debt, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio }

data.span: return({ owner: prev_states[0].owner, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral + amount, debt: prev_states[0].debt, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio });

functions.name: __leader_deposit
__delegate_deposit
__covenant_policy_borrow

exprs.span: { owner: prev_states[0].owner, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral, debt: prev_states[0].debt + amount, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio }

data.span: return({ owner: prev_states[0].owner, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral, debt: prev_states[0].debt + amount, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio });

functions.name: __leader_borrow
__delegate_borrow
__covenant_policy_repay

exprs.span: { owner: prev_states[0].owner, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral, debt: prev_states[0].debt - amount, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio }

data.span: return({ owner: prev_states[0].owner, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral, debt: prev_states[0].debt - amount, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio });
